description: Seed entailment dataset for TruthLens. Each row is a (claim, evidence, label) triple. Labels: SUPPORTED = evidence entails the claim; CONTRADICTED = evidence contradicts the claim; NEI = evidence is not relevant enough to decide (off-topic). Used to train the linear stance classifier.

data.claim: The mitochondria produces most of the cell's ATP.
data.evidence: The mitochondria is the organelle that produces most of the cell's ATP through aerobic respiration.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Mitochondria generate energy for the cell.
data.evidence: The mitochondria is the organelle that produces most of the cell's ATP through aerobic respiration.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Photosynthesis produces oxygen and glucose.
data.evidence: Photosynthesis converts carbon dioxide and water into glucose and oxygen using light energy.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: DNA contains four bases.
data.evidence: DNA is composed of four nucleotide bases: adenine, thymine, guanine, and cytosine.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Mature red blood cells carry oxygen with hemoglobin.
data.evidence: Human red blood cells lack a nucleus when mature and carry oxygen using hemoglobin.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Ribosomes build proteins.
data.evidence: Ribosomes are the cellular structures responsible for synthesizing proteins from messenger RNA.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
data.evidence: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at standard atmospheric pressure of one atmosphere at sea level.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Water freezes at 0 degrees Celsius.
data.evidence: Water freezes into ice at 0 degrees Celsius at standard atmospheric pressure.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The chemical formula of water is H2O.
data.evidence: The chemical formula for water is H2O, made of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Gold has the chemical symbol Au.
data.evidence: Gold is a chemical element with the symbol Au and atomic number 79.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: A base has a pH above 7.
data.evidence: An acid is a substance with a pH below 7, while a base has a pH above 7.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The speed of light is about 300,000 kilometers per second.
data.evidence: The speed of light in a vacuum is approximately 299,792 kilometers per second.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Sound moves at roughly 343 meters per second in air.
data.evidence: Sound travels at roughly 343 meters per second in dry air at 20 degrees Celsius.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: An object in motion stays in motion without an external force.
data.evidence: Newton's first law states that an object in motion stays in motion unless acted on by an external force.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Earth's gravity accelerates objects at about 9.8 meters per second squared.
data.evidence: Gravity on Earth accelerates falling objects at approximately 9.8 meters per second squared.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Energy is conserved and only changes form.
data.evidence: Energy cannot be created or destroyed, only transformed, according to the law of conservation of energy.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The Sun is a star at the center of the Solar System.
data.evidence: The Sun is a star located at the center of our Solar System.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Earth orbits the Sun in about 365 days.
data.evidence: Earth completes one orbit around the Sun in approximately 365.25 days.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The Moon is Earth's natural satellite.
data.evidence: The Moon is Earth's only natural satellite and orbits the planet about every 27.3 days.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Mars is the fourth planet from the Sun.
data.evidence: Mars is the fourth planet from the Sun and is often called the Red Planet.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: There are eight planets in the Solar System.
data.evidence: There are eight planets in the Solar System after Pluto was reclassified as a dwarf planet in 2006.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Mount Everest is the tallest mountain above sea level.
data.evidence: Mount Everest is the highest mountain above sea level on Earth, standing about 8,849 meters tall.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The Pacific is the largest ocean.
data.evidence: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's oceans.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The Nile is the longest river in the world.
data.evidence: The Nile is widely regarded as the longest river in the world, flowing through northeastern Africa.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Paris is the capital of France.
data.evidence: The capital of France is Paris.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Python was created by Guido van Rossum.
data.evidence: Python is a dynamically typed, interpreted programming language created by Guido van Rossum.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Python is dynamically typed.
data.evidence: Python is a dynamically typed, interpreted programming language created by Guido van Rossum.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: Binary search is logarithmic on sorted data.
data.evidence: Binary search runs in logarithmic time on a sorted array.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: RAM loses its contents when power is off.
data.evidence: RAM is volatile memory that loses its contents when power is removed.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: World War II ended in 1945.
data.evidence: World War II ended in 1945 with the surrender of Germany and Japan.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The Berlin Wall fell in 1989.
data.evidence: The Berlin Wall fell in 1989, marking a key moment in the end of the Cold War.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The adult human skeleton has 206 bones.
data.evidence: The human body has 206 bones in the adult skeleton.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The pH scale goes from 0 to 14.
data.evidence: The pH scale ranges from 0 to 14, with 7 being neutral at 25 degrees Celsius.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The Sahara is the largest hot desert.
data.evidence: The Sahara is the largest hot desert in the world, covering much of North Africa.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The Amazon is the largest tropical rainforest.
data.evidence: The Amazon rainforest is the largest tropical rainforest, located mostly in Brazil.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: A compiler turns source code into machine code.
data.evidence: A compiler translates source code into machine code before the program runs.
data.label: SUPPORTED

data.claim: The US Declaration of Independence was adopted in 1776.
data.evidence: The Declaration of Independence of the United States was adopted in 1776.
data.label: SUPPORTED
